summary: Fixed overlay mode feature that wasn't working. Root cause: recreateWindow function didn't exist and registerIpcHandlers was missing required callbacks. Implemented createWindow(overlayMode) function with proper window configuration for both normal and overlay modes, added calculateOverlayBounds() for positioning, created recreateWindow() function to switch between modes, updated registerIpcHandlers call to pass all 4 required parameters (storeService, getTrayManager, getWindow, recreateWindow). Packaged to dist5 folder and launched successfully.
current_status: Application running with overlay mode now functional
files_modified: src/main/index.ts (major refactor - added overlay mode support)
overlay_mode_features: Window transforms to 200x200 overlay when enabled
Transparent, always-on-top, frameless window in overlay mode
Position options: top-left, top-right, bottom-left, bottom-right
Show percentage and progress bar toggles
next_steps: Test overlay mode by enabling it in Settings
